name: the-syntraa
description: Mongo ping: npm run mongo-ping-cli (no colon) | npm run mongo-ping | .\mongo-ping.cmd — bare mongo:ping in PowerShell is not a command. npm audit: prefer npm audit fix without --force; see apps/web/README.md.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @syntraa/types --if-present && npm run build -w web
